open_repo_assist_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix(security): stop leaking ex.Message in CanvasCapability and BrowserProxyCapability
[Repo Assist] feat: add ExecApprovalsEvaluator policy evaluation step
[Repo Assist] fix(security): apply TokenSanitizer to WSL diagnostic output
[Repo Assist] fix(wsl): add mountFsTab=false + [time] section to wsl.conf; make IsAlreadyConfigured probe section-aware
open_repo_assist_prs.note: Addresses issue #281 items #5 and #6. 3 new tests.

open_repo_assist_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix(wsl): terminate process tree on caller cancellation in WslExeCommandRunner
open_repo_assist_prs.note: Addresses issue #281 item #7. Created this run.

259.note: CI failure is pre-existing flaky integration test

281.note: Confirmed isolation bug: OPENCLAW_TRAY_APPDATA_DIR vs OPENCLAW_TRAY_DATA_DIR

283.note: Confirmed root cause: missing ExtendsContentIntoTitleBar + repeated TryBringToFront. Linked to PR #285.

288.note: Review comment: HttpClient anti-pattern, dependency surface, TtsCapability conflict

99.note: Voice mode architecture context: STT/TTS provider structure from PR #288, WebView bridge status, WinRT built-in STT suggestion

wsl-cancellation-kill.description: Added catch(OperationCanceledException) block without 'when' guard to kill process tree on caller cancellation in WslExeCommandRunner.RunProcessAsync. Addresses issue #281 item #7.

nuget-cache-key.description: Filed as issue #302 because CI lacks workflow permission to push ci.yml. Issue documents the fix and patch for human PR creation.

wsl-conf-section-probe.description: Added mountFsTab=false and [time] useWindowsTimezone=true to wsl.conf template. Made IsAlreadyConfiguredAsync probe section-aware with awk. 3 new tests.

exec-approvals-evaluator.description: ExecApprovalsEvaluator (policy evaluation phase), ExecApprovalsAllowlistMatcher, ExecApprovalV2EvaluationOutcome. 33 new tests. Based on PR #295.

canvas-proxy-exception-message-leaks.description: CanvasCapability and BrowserProxyCapability ex.Message leaks fixed.

PR #288 (RBrid) audio: Whisper STT + Piper TTS as MCP-callable node capabilities — MERGED 2026-05-07. Providers: Piper (default), Windows SAPI, ElevenLabs. Commands: stt.transcribe, stt.listen, stt.status, tts.speak.
WindowsAppRuntime version mismatch: CI installs 1.8.260101001 but csproj references Microsoft.WindowsAppSDK 2.0.1. Tray uses WindowsAppSDKSelfContained=true so may not matter at runtime.

test_baseline.note: Both test suites run on Linux. build.ps1 requires Windows. Baselines from this run (2026-05-10).
